description: Corrently.io, operated by STROMDAO, provides energy and carbon data services focused on the German electricity market, including green power forecasts, CO2 metrics, pricing, scheduling, and related energy-management functions. Its products are aimed at developers and energy applications that need location-based electricity and sustainability data.
summary: Corrently.io exposes a REST API at https://api.corrently.io/v2.0 with an OpenAPI spec, an MCP tool endpoint at https://api.corrently.io/v2.0/mcp/tools, and a Node package `corrently-api`; docs describe JWT access tokens used as bearer auth and also accepted as a `token` parameter.
